values.description: API base URL with version. Change to production URL for prod environment.
Production API base URL (fill in on deployment)
JWT access token — auto-populated by the Login and Refresh Token requests
JWT refresh token — auto-populated by the Login request
Current user's MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Login and Create User requests
Role MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Role request
Unit MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Unit request
BuildingType MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Building Type request
UnitType MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Unit Type request
Feature MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Feature request
Client MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Client request
Deal MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Deal request
Task MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Create Task request
Communication MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Log Communication request
Document MongoDB ObjectId — auto-populated by Upload Document request
